title: KMU Assistant
tagline: RAG chatbot for German SMEs — grounded answers on DSGVO and employment law from your own documents.
description: KMU Assistant (KMU-Assistent) is a retrieval-augmented chatbot built for kleine und mittlere Unternehmen in Germany. It ingests your PDF knowledge base—DSGVO and Arbeitsrecht sources—and answers employee and compliance questions with citations grounded in those documents. Local vector search keeps retrieval on your infrastructure; the Anthropic API generates the final responses.

screenshots.caption: Streamlit chat interface (showing Question and Answer)

highlights: RAG pipeline over DSGVO and Arbeitsrecht PDFs tailored to German SME workflows
Local vector search with ChromaDB and sentence-transformers embeddings
Ingestion workflow from raw PDFs to queryable knowledge base (`python -m src.ingest`)
Streamlit chat UI for multi-turn Q&A after one-time document setup

items: Client or company names and deployment environments
Source PDF licensing and proprietary document sets
Internal architecture diagrams and ingestion tuning
Prompt templates, evaluation metrics, and usage data
restricted.label: Client details, source documents, architecture, and metrics are available on request
